results.rendered_html:
vivartita p. p.
1 Turned or whirled round, revolved.
2 Moved round or about, rolling; vivartitabhrūriyamadya śikṣate  Ś. 1. 23. 
3 Mangled, hacked, cut to pieces;  Māl. 3. 17. 
4 Unfolded.
5 Distorted, bent down.
